titles.en: Reward of uttering a Name of Allah while performing ablution
Reward of uttering a Name of Allah while performing ablution

segments: حَدَّثَنِی الْحَسَنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ عَنْ عَمِّهِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِیلَ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ الْحَکَمِ عَنْ دَاوُدَ الْعِجْلِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ فَذَکَرَ اسْمَ اللَّهِ طَهُرَ جَمِیعُ جَسَدِهِ وَ کَانَ الْوُضُوءُ إِلَی الْوُضُوءِ کَفَّارَهً لِمَا بَیْنَهُمَا مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ وَ مَنْ لَمْ یُسَمِّ لَمْ یَطْهُرْ مِنْ جَسَدِهِ إِلَّا مَا أَصَابَهُ الْمَاءُ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی الْحَسَنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ عَنْ عَمِّهِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِیلَ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ الْحَکَمِ عَنْ دَاوُدَ الْعِجْلِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ فَذَکَرَ اسْمَ اللَّهِ طَهُرَ جَمِیعُ جَسَدِهِ وَ کَانَ الْوُضُوءُ إِلَی الْوُضُوءِ کَفَّارَهً لِمَا بَیْنَهُمَا مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ وَ مَنْ لَمْ یُسَمِّ لَمْ یَطْهُرْ مِنْ جَسَدِهِ إِلَّا مَا أَصَابَهُ الْمَاءُ.

segments: 1. It was narrated to me by Ja’far b. Muhammad b. Masroor who said it was narrated to me by al-Hassan b. Muhammad b. ’Amir from his uncle Abdillah b. ’Amir from Muhammad b. Ismail from Ali b. al-Hakam from Dawud al-’Ijli from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who utters a name of Allah while performing ablution his whole body will become pure. All his sins between two ablutions will be wiped off. One who does not utter a name of Allah while performing ablution only the parts of body concerned with ablution will become pure and not his whole body.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. It was narrated to me by Ja’far b. Muhammad b. Masroor who said it was narrated to me by al-Hassan b. Muhammad b. ’Amir from his uncle Abdillah b. ’Amir from Muhammad b. Ismail from Ali b. al-Hakam from Dawud al-’Ijli from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who utters a name of Allah while performing ablution his whole body will become pure. All his sins between two ablutions will be wiped off. One who does not utter a name of Allah while performing ablution only the parts of body concerned with ablution will become pure and not his whole body.”

narratorChain.raw: حَدَّثَنِی جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مَسْرُورٍ قَالَ

parts.text: حَدَّثَنِی جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مَسْرُورٍ قَالَ

titles.en: Reward of uttering a Name of Allah while performing ablution

segments: : مَنْ ذَکَرَ اللَّهَ عَلَی وُضُوئِهِ فَکَأَنَّمَا اغْتَسَلَ.
arabic.text: : مَنْ ذَکَرَ اللَّهَ عَلَی وُضُوئِهِ فَکَأَنَّمَا اغْتَسَلَ.

segments: 2. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Muawiyah b. Hakeem from Abdillah b. al-Mughira from Abdillah b. Muskan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “A person who utters the name of Allah while performing ablution is like one who has performed a Ghusl.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 2. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Muawiyah b. Hakeem from Abdillah b. al-Mughira from Abdillah b. Muskan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “A person who utters the name of Allah while performing ablution is like one who has performed a Ghusl.”

narratorChain.raw: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ مُعَاوِیَهَ بْنِ حُکَیْمٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْمُغِیرَهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مُسْکَانَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ
